title: Moonlit Guns for Hire
overview: Pressure is at an all time high as the ladies of KOTOBUKI Flight Corps fend off more than just air pirates in the air and on land.

title: The Wandering Six
overview: The squad’s R&R is interrupted when they receive a new mission for triple the regular pay! It’s an opportunity too good to pass up, but does this mean triple the danger?

title: Rachma's Longest Day
overview: The town of Rachma refuses to sell the Raiden, a powerful fighter plane. Elite Industries won't accept "no" for an answer. Now, our intrepid heroines must fight back.

title: Elite Stronghold
overview: The squad must somehow infiltrate Elite Industries’ stronghold. Fortunately, a traveling tavern gives Zara a sudden idea.

title: The Splendid Aleshma
overview: Julia fundamentally disagrees with an idealistic and influential man named Isao. But he apparently has a plan to deal with both the air pirates and the energy crisis.

title: No Place to Return
overview: When a solo mission goes horribly awry, Kylie’s skills as a pilot are put to the ultimate test.

title: Blood for a Nazarin Pound
overview: Most people rely on water to put out fires, but using a bomb to douse an inferno? Only the KOTOBUKI Flight Corps could think up a stunt like that!

title: The Great Airship Robbery
overview: The KOTOBUKI Flight Corps must transport a rare fish across the skies, but when their mission makes newspaper headlines, air pirates come calling to claim the valuable cargo.

title: The Vagabond Toddler
overview: Kylie promises to stay out of trouble when her plane is grounded for repairs. Too bad a scenic flight with Allen in a training plane lands her in hot water…

title: The Aggressive Bombers
overview: Join the Brotherhood of Freedom Union or be bombed into oblivion? Not if the KOTOBUKI Flight Corps has anything to say about it!

title: Duel in Ikesuka
overview: Dog fight? No, it’s a dog WAR as the KOTOBUKI Flight Corps joins the aerial assault on Isao’s forces and Ikesuka!

title: Kotobuki of the Setting Sun
overview: Bravery. Chutzpah. Derring-do. The KOTOBUKI Flight Corps will need all that and more as the battle in the skies over Ikesuka soars to its thrilling conclusion!
